title: Health Information Systems Technician Program Educational Objectives
content:
Health Information Systems Technician Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To contribute to public health by building a bridge between the health sector and technology as a health information systems technician working in the information technology departments of institutions and organizations in the health sector

2. To provide manpower to the sector that is competent in the use of computer and software technologies, has basic health knowledge, is highly aware of environmental and social issues, respects human rights, is committed to ethical values, has advanced problem-solving skills, has entrepreneurial qualities and has management and organization skills

3. To train health information systems technicians who can use the theoretical knowledge given in the sector through practical courses and compulsory internship practices
